scenario.name: basic_call
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:+18001000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "SIPp Caller" <sip:+15005550001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:+18001000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:+15005550001@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sipp 53655765 2353687637 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 0 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv

ACK [contact_uri] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "SIPp Caller" <sip:+15005550001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:+18001000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE [contact_uri] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "SIPp Caller" <sip:+15005550001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:+18001000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
